prompt: 就你對我的了解  幫我出一個 pdf 列出我做過的P0 issue STAR 故事

input.command: ls -a /d/mybot/git/tool/ | grep -iE "token|cred|jira" ; echo --- ; ls /d/mybot/handover/scripts/ 2>/dev/null
input.description: List credential files and handover scripts

input.command: cd /d/mybot/fw-multi-agent && git pull 2>&1 | tail -3
input.description: Pull latest handover repo

input.command: which acli 2>/dev/null; ls /d/mybot/.mcp.json 2>/dev/null && cat /d/mybot/.mcp.json | head -40
input.description: Check for acli CLI and MCP config

input.command:
cd /d/mybot && curl -s -u "alice.chan@positivegrid.com:$(grep JIRA_API_TOKEN .env | cut -d= -f2-)" "https://positivegrid.atlassian.net/rest/api/2/issue/FWP-840?fields=status,comment,attachment" | python -c "

input.description: Fetch FWP-840 status, attachments, comments
